filesystem.description: Read/write local files. Already covered by Claude Code's built-in tools — enable only if you need MCP-specific filesystem access.

github.description: Query GitHub: issues, PRs, repos. Requires GITHUB_TOKEN env var.

slack.description: Read Slack channels and threads for context. Requires SLACK_BOT_TOKEN and SLACK_TEAM_ID.

postgres.description: Run read-only SQL queries against a Postgres database. Requires DATABASE_URL env var.

sentry.description: Query Sentry for errors and stack traces. Requires SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN and SENTRY_ORG.
